estimators.name: Jason Zarrillo
estimators.title: CEO (functions as estimator)
personalization_hooks: Customer reviews specifically cite Jason coming to the site personally to do estimates — he is the bid owner.

Stand Tall = 'Stand Tall Painting and Contracting Inc.' on BBB — they have an in-house painting capability already, which is BOTH a hurdle (overlap) AND an opening (overflow capacity). Ahmad pitch = 'when your in-house team is booked, we keep your reputation intact.'
Small commercial / retail fit-up specialist — high frequency of small jobs = recurring sub-trade need.
COR-certified — safety alignment with Ashrah's training narrative.

sources.claim: Stand Tall Painting and Contracting Inc. BBB listing — in-house painting capability
Commercial fit-up and retail maintenance scope; COR-certified

fallback_contact.name: Gilliane Delequis
fallback_contact.title: Office Manager
fallback_contact.rationale: Office Manager is the gatekeeper for inbound sub inquiries — get on her good side first.

needs_review_flags: Stand Tall has in-house painting — Ashrah pitch must explicitly address overflow / specialized scope, not compete head-on.
